name: storybook
description: Storybook documentation for the @aziontech/webkit component library

scripts.test:visual:static: concurrently -k -s first -n SB,TEST "http-server dist -p 6007 --silent" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:6007 && test-storybook --url http://127.0.0.1:6007"
scripts.test:visual:ci: concurrently -k -s first -n SB,TEST "http-server dist -p 6007 --silent" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:6007 && test-storybook --ci --shard=${VISUAL_SHARD:-1/1} --url http://127.0.0.1:6007"
scripts.test:visual:update: concurrently -k -s first -n SB,TEST "http-server dist -p 6007 --silent" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:6007 && test-storybook -u --url http://127.0.0.1:6007"
